statement:
A transformation rule converts one 3x3 text grid into another. Study the examples and apply the rule to the test input.

Example 1:
Input:          Output:
A B C           C B A
D E F    →      F E D
G H I           I H G

Example 2:
Input:          Output:
X Y Z           Z Y X
P Q R    →      R Q P
S T U           U T S

Test input:
Input:
K L M
N O P
Q R S

What is the output grid? Give it as three rows.
constraints: Identify the transformation from the examples
Apply the same transformation to the test input
correctAnswer: m l k, p o n, s r q
acceptableVariants: M L K / P O N / S R Q
row1: m l k, row2: p o n, row3: s r q
